ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match is played */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the match (e.g., score or outcome) */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  "recurring_event" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is a recurring event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., football, basketball) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school" TEXT /* School the team represents */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the venue */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "available_dates" TEXT /* JSON array of dates when the venue is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match to which this result corresponds */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the result was reported */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match for which attendance is recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the match */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the user attended the match (true/false) */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Time when the user attended the match (if applicable) */,
  "check_in_method" TEXT /* Method used to check in (e.g., QR code, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match for which the notification is sent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification is scheduled to be sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, pending, failed) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
